llm_keywords.evidence: |I| ranges from 8.90e-103 A at -0.1 V to 2.3994540300343092e-05 A at -6 V, a span of about 97.43 decades.

Matched |V| points have similar |I| values, for example 1.3248374746185266e-08 A at -2.4 V versus 1.327865571005623e-08 A at +2.4 V, and 6.92102803659538e-12 A at -1.4 V versus 6.928625241384999e-12 A at +1.4 V.
The smallest listed |I| values occur near the lowest measured |V|: 8.897350992969297e-103 A at -0.1 V and 6.899103373692976e-103 A at +0.1 V.
